query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(
    CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - (
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) -
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0)
    )
  ) < 0.01 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exact_match,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(
    CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - (
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) -
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0)
    )
  ) >= 0.01 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mismatch_count,
  MIN(
    CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - (
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) -
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0)
    )
  ) AS min_diff,
  MAX(
    CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - (
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) -
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0)
    )
  ) AS max_diff
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE raw_json IS NOT NULL
  AND amount IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 100;

      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) +
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0) -
      COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0)
    )
  ) AS max_diff
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE raw_json IS NOT NULL
  AND amount IS NOT NULL
